final_prompt.prompt:
Create a detailed exploded-view technical illustration of a Sony A7 camera.

Style/medium: needs a technical product illustration aesthetic — exact rendering technique is yours
Composition: must be exploded-view layout with all components separated and labeled
Subject: must include all internal and external components of a Sony A7 camera
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a clean, technical diagram atmosphere — exact lighting setup is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: needs a technical illustration surface treatment — exact material rendering is yours
Text (verbatim): must include component labels in Spanish with technical names for all parts
Constraints: must preserve accurate Sony A7 camera anatomy, all components must be visible and labeled
Avoid:
